title: ItemisedQuote
description: One consultancy's complete structured quote, assembled from mid-call log_quote tool calls plus the end_call_outcome. `items` holds only fees the CONSULTANCY charges or collects; university/UKVI figures (tuition, living costs, bank statement) are separate top-level fields so quotes stay comparable. Item names must be members of the active vertical config's `quote_items` — enforced by scripts/validate_config.py, not hardcoded here (config, not code).

persona_id.description: Which counterparty persona (Tier A/B); null for a real consultancy

university.description: University this quote routes the student to

item.description: Member of config quote_items (cross-checked by validator)

is_revised.description: True when this price moved during negotiation — the demo moment

revised_from.description: Original amount before the negotiation moved it

transcript_ref.description: Timestamp or utterance id evidencing this figure

tuition_per_year.description: University tuition quoted, per year, in `currency`

living_costs_advised.description: Living costs the consultancy advised, in `currency`

bank_statement_required_pkr.description: Funds the consultancy says must be shown, in PKR

conditions.description: Strings like 'IELTS 6.5 required', 'deposit within 2 weeks of offer'

red_flag_ids.description: Ids of config red_flag_rules that fired on this quote

outcome_detail.description: e.g. callback: 'Tuesday 3pm, ask for Maryam'; decline: reason given
